title: tragacantha leporina
intro: Tragacantha leporina, also known as the Butterfly Clover or Tragacanth, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to form a protective barrier in the digestive tract, making it a natural remedy for diarrhea and stomach ulcers. The health benefits of Tragacantha leporina include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, powders, and teas, to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
